title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Power Grid Corporation - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
